top_queries.query: select null as TABLE_CAT, null as TABLE_SCHEM, 'Articles' as TABLE_NAME, un as NON_UNIQUE, null as INDEX_QUALIFIER, n as INDEX_NAME, 3 as TYPE, op as ORDINAL_POSITION, cn as COLUMN_NAME, null as ASC_OR_DESC, 0 as CARDINALITY, 0 as PAGES, null as FILTER_CONDITION from (select 0 as un,'sqlite_autoindex_Articles_1' as n,1 as op,'slug' as cn);
SELECT NULL as TABLE_CAT, NULL AS TABLE_SCHEM,name AS TABLE_NAME,type as TABLE_TYPE, NULL AS REMARKS, NULL AS TYPE_CAT, NULL AS TYPE_SCHEM, NULL AS TYPE_NAME FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table'
select sql from sqlite_schema where lower(name) = lower('Articles')
select sql from sqlite_schema where lower(name) = lower('Articles') and type in ('table', 'view')

WITH all_tables AS (SELECT name AS tn FROM sqlite_master WHERE type = 'table' and name='Articles') 
SELECT NULL as TABLE_CAT, NULL AS TABLE_SCHEM, at.tn as TABLE_NAME,
pti.name as COLUMN_NAME,12 AS DATA_TYPE,pti.type AS TYPE_NAME,0 AS COLUMN_SIZE,0 as COLUMN_SIZE,0 as BUFFER_LENGTH,0 as DECIMAL_DIGITS,
1 as NULLABLE,NULL as REMARKS,NULL as COLUMN_DEF,0 as SQL_DATA_TYPE,0 as SQL_DATETIME_SUB,0 as CHAR_OCTET_LENGTH,pti.cid as ORDINAL_POSITION,'' as IS_NULLABLE,NULL as SCOPE_CATALOG,NULL as SCOPE_SCHEMA,NULL as SCOPE_TABLE,NULL as SOURCE_DATA_TYPE,'' as IS_AUTOINCREMENT,'' as IS_GENERATEDCOLUMN
FROM all_tables at INNER JOIN pragma_table_info(at.tn) pti
ORDER BY TABLE_NAME

slowest_queries.query: select 'null' as PKTABLE_CAT, 'null' as PKTABLE_SCHEM, ptn as PKTABLE_NAME, pcn as PKCOLUMN_NAME, 'null' as FKTABLE_CAT, 'null' as FKTABLE_SCHEM, 'Articles' as FKTABLE_NAME, fcn as FKCOLUMN_NAME, ks as KEY_SEQ, ur as UPDATE_RULE, dr as DELETE_RULE, fkn as FK_NAME, pkn as PK_NAME, 5 as DEFERRABILITY from (select -1 as ks, '' as ptn, '' as fcn, '' as pcn, 3 as ur, 3 as dr,  '' as fkn,  '' as pkn ) limit 0;
select null as TABLE_CAT, null as TABLE_SCHEM, 'Articles' as TABLE_NAME, cn as COLUMN_NAME, ks as KEY_SEQ, pk as PK_NAME from (select null as cn, null as pk, 0 as ks) limit 0;

select null as TABLE_CAT, null as TABLE_SCHEM, 'Articles' as TABLE_NAME, un as NON_UNIQUE, null as INDEX_QUALIFIER, n as INDEX_NAME, 3 as TYPE, op as ORDINAL_POSITION, cn as COLUMN_NAME, null as ASC_OR_DESC, 0 as CARDINALITY, 0 as PAGES, null as FILTER_CONDITION from (select 0 as un,'sqlite_autoindex_Articles_1' as n,1 as op,'slug' as cn);
select snapshot from _astro_db_snapshot order by id desc limit 1;
select sql from sqlite_schema where lower(name) = lower('Articles')
select sql from sqlite_schema where lower(name) = lower('Articles') and type in ('table', 'view')
